title: Rechargeable USB Desk Fan with Digital Display, 5-Speed Ultra Quiet Table Fan, 90° Manual Tilt & Hangable Fan for Bedroom, Kitchen, Camping, Office，Living Room
features: 【Smart Digital Display & Adjustable 5 Speeds Wind】：Our table fans is equipped with an advanced smart display screen that provides real-time monitoring of the precise airflow percentage (1-100%). Experience dual-control innovation: a short press on the up or down arrow button immediately activates 5 preset speeds (1%/25%/50%/75%/100%). However, the desk fan utilizes a brushless motor, allowing for seamless transition into a stepless speed regulation mode by long-pressing the up or down button, enabling precise adjustment to any desired wind speed level within the 1-100% range.meets your diverse needs in different occasions.

【USB-powered And Long Battery Life】：Our USB fan not only supports flexible USB power supply and can be easily plugged into various devices such as computers, power banks, and USB sockets, but also has a large-capacity battery of 5400mAh. The USB power supply mode requires an adapter with ≤5V/2A (maximum) and 6.5W (a high-power charger like 9V/12V may lead to incorrect charging display and rapid power consumption). The perfect combination of the convenience of USB power supply and the long battery life ensures a continuous airflow. There is no need for frequent charging, allowing this desktop fan to bring you coolness throughout the summer!

【90 Degree 3D Circulation Airflow】：Experience unparalleled comfort with our desk fan's manual 90° up-and-down tilt adjustment, allowing you to direct the airflow precisely where you need it most. Designed with 3D circulation technology, this fan creates a balanced airflow pattern that effectively distributes cool air throughout your space, ensuring every corner benefits from a refreshing breeze. Whether you're working at your desk, relaxing in bed, or enjoying a quiet read, our rechargeable fan's adjustable design and circulation capability make it the perfect choice for maintaining a consistent and pleasant indoor climate.

【Ultra Quiet Desk Fan】：Our ultra-quiet turbo fan feature a double-helix blade design that delivers powerful airflow while keeping noise levels as low as 35 decibels, allowing you to enjoy a serene cool. This innovative design maximizes airflow efficiency without sacrificing quietness, making this bedroom fan perfect for studying, reading, working, sleeping, doing yoga, and more.

【Portable Design & Multiple Mounting Option 】 ：Our portable fan is Compact, lightweight, and easy to carry, featuring versatile mounting options and placement flexibility—it can be hung on hooks to save space, placed stably on tables, or adhered to smooth tiles and glass for use. From camping trips and yoga classes to kitchen chores and cozy bedroom nights, this cooling fan caters to your needs, ensuring you stay cool and comfortable wherever you go.

Rechargeable USB Desk Fan with Digital Display Merchant video Our fan features a smart digital display, clearly showing current wind speed & settings. It offers 5 preset speeds & stepless adjustment. Tap up/down for 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% speed increments. Easy to control. Long press for stepless switching or off. Experience the power of air circulation with our air circulation fan. Its advanced design ensures that fresh airflow covers every corner of the room, creating a cozy atmosphere. Ideal for bedroom or living room Our table fan features a smart display for precise speed control. Easily adjust via digital interface. Clear display for settings and info. USB fan: upgraded motor, smoother, stronger wind. Multi-speeds for different needs. Desk fan with advanced airflow design cools fast, circulates air, creating natural breeze. Customized blades ensure even, soft wind with wide coverage Our desk fan with 5400mAh battery lasts up to 24h on one charge, ensuring coolness at home, work, or leisure without frequent recharging . Easily powered by USB-C, power bank, laptop or car adapter, the Rechargeable USB Desk Fan is ideal for desk, road trips or outdoor adventures.Use the less than 5V/2A(max) 6.5W adapters . High-power chargers (e.g., 9V/12V) cause false charge display & rapid power drain. Designed for light sleepers, this USB desktop fan operates in an ultra-quiet mode at <35 dB, ensuring that sleep is not disturbed while maintaining a perfect balance of airflow.
